title: Kaworu KNEW it wasnt Adam on the cross
display_title: Kaworu KNEW it wasnt Adam on the cross
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu KNEW it wasn't Adam on the cross             Quote Post by KaworuNagisa17 » Mon Aug 09, 2004 7:50 pm I've known this for a while and I'm probably saying stuff y'all already know.. Kaworu knew that it was Lilith down there in Terminal Dogma. Of course, millions of viewers didn't know until the director's cut scenes of episode 24 told us. Kaworu, during meeting w/ SEELE: "Adam...whose soul resides within me...whose body resides within Ikari.." also the line, "Ikari...is he just like me?" In my opinion, this is easily the biggest contribution that the directors cuts gave to us. I mean, Kaworu was fully explained w/ just that one scene with SEELE. He KNEW it wasn't Adam down there because he KNEW Adam was bonded to Gendo. He went down there because he decided to die. Through Shinji, he fell in love with humanity and therefore, wanted it to live on past his time. Kaworu's my fave Eva character so when I first discovered this, I marked out like a madman (shakes cut scene fansub VHS in hand) anyone else love this??

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Aug 09, 2004 9:57 pm I think it was just a goof by Gainax. Kaworu looked genuinely surprised to see that it was Lilith on the cross and not Adam. I know what you're all going to say: "nooo fool Gainax doesn't make mistakes, everything was intentional!!", but still I think it was a continuity error.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Mon Aug 09, 2004 10:07 pm No, Gianax can make mistakes. Like determining how large an eva is compared to, say, a human.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Aug 09, 2004 10:10 pm coff wrote: I think it was just a goof by Gainax. Kaworu looked genuinely surprised to see that it was Lilith on the cross and not Adam. I know what you're all going to say: "nooo fool Gainax doesn't make mistakes, everything was intentional!!", but still I think it was a continuity error.

[]:             Quote Post by Karma Burn » Tue Aug 10, 2004 4:01 pm How pessimistic, I don't think anyone is really that pitiful.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Tue Aug 10, 2004 4:10 pm Yeah or maybe he was suprised to see lilith in the state that she was in. Her soul residing in Rei and her body crippled and bolted to the cross. He might of known that it wasn't Adam down there but it was still a suprising site to see. Why do people automatically assume gainax made some sort of mistake?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 10, 2004 4:26 pm Continuity Error! Need I also remind you that in that scene they also put too many Seele monoliths in?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Tue Aug 10, 2004 4:31 pm Esion wrote: Yeah or maybe he was suprised to see lilith in the state that she was in. Her soul residing in Rei and her body crippled and bolted to the cross. He might of known that it wasn't Adam down there but it was still a suprising site to see. Why do people automatically assume gainax made some sort of mistake?

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Tue Aug 10, 2004 4:38 pm Impossible, Gainax nevermakes mistakes. *curls into a ball* *flys away*

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Aug 10, 2004 7:07 pm If an Eva can at once be the size of five Semi's fused together, and then become large enough to step on several pine trees in one step, that shows that there are some things you just shouldn't take too seriously. Director's Cuts exist for a reason.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 10, 2004 7:19 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: Director's Cuts exist for a reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Esion » Tue Aug 10, 2004 7:50 pm ROFL.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Tue Aug 10, 2004 8:49 pm Well you're the ones scrambling to buy everything they put out. Can't really blame them.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Tue Aug 10, 2004 10:14 pm Well, the explination on the first post is a nice way to see all that, but we have to think about something.. How the hell did seele knew that Adam was in Gendo's Hand??????

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Wed Aug 11, 2004 7:08 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Hexon.Arq wrote: Director's Cuts exist for a reason.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 11, 2004 8:54 am Thanks, I'm here all week. But seriously, the director's cuts are considered the "true" and "canon" version of the episodes. However, in this case, its very obviously a continuity error. These happen. It just irritates me to see them create even more confusion in an already confusing series.

[]:             Quote Post by KaworuNagisa17 » Wed Aug 11, 2004 10:52 am now that I think on it, a continuity error is definite, in this case. however, on the 'he didn't know it was Lilith'....course he didn't know. If ya go by the fact that he knew it wasn't Adam, then one could say that it didn't know Lilith was there instead. He was surprised to see her, because he didn't expect her to appear there of all places. Meh...I'd have to see again

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Aug 11, 2004 2:29 pm Presuming that Kaworu, as the vessel of the soul of Adam, would have some greater knowledge of the greater scheme, he would have expected to have found Lilith, as he would know that the Geofront was just the Black Egg of Lilith. Obviously he didn't, and as such, he is subject to misinformation at the hands of humans. I need to sit down with some translations of Kaworu's lines between episode 24 and 24' and see if I can find out if it is actuality a continuity error, or possibly a translation error. Occasionally they happen, and cause issues like this.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Wed Aug 11, 2004 3:52 pm Well, don't strain yourself. I think we were all better off before this occured...

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Wed Aug 11, 2004 4:43 pm KaworuNagisa17 wrote: however, on the 'he didn't know it was Lilith'....course he didn't know. If ya go by the fact that he knew it wasn't Adam, then one could say that it didn't know Lilith was there instead.
